untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of eight consecutive new price line candlesticks and Fibonacci-based reversal level calculations (38% and 62% of trend height) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. These require custom pattern recognition logic and multi-bar lookback with specific candlestick sequence validation not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick pattern requiring: (1) Detection of 8 consecutive candles forming a specific pattern, (2) Trend height measurement and Fibonacci ratio calculations (38% and 62%), (3) Dynamic reversal level computation. The allowed indicators lack pattern recognition capabilities and multi-bar sequence analysis needed. The exit at 62% boundary is conceptual and cannot be mapped to a specific price indicator without knowing the calculated Fibonacci levels. A custom backtest module would be required to implement this signal.
